Ted Hui is on China's blacklist - now parliamentary politicians have helped him to Denmark

Ted Hui is one of Hong Kong's most controversial pro - democracy activists, and his trip to Denmark now risks arousing China's anger and at the same time puts the government and the parliamentary parties in a dilemma.


Google Translate

quote.msg:
Ted Hui is on China's blacklist - now parliamentary politicians have helped him to Denmark

Ted Hui is one of Hong Kong's most controversial pro - democracy activists, and his trip to Denmark now risks arousing China's anger and at the same time puts the government and the parliamentary parties in a dilemma.


Google Translate

replies.msg: 真？！
咁突然

The Danish Foreign Minister, Jeppe Kofod (S), is suddenly facing a potentially explosive development, which risks having consequences for the Danish government's panda diplomacy with China.

Early Tuesday morning, one of Hong Kong's most controversial opposition politicians and pro-democracy activists, Ted Hui, landed at Copenhagen Airport after a trip out of Hong Kong that could only be done because several Danish parliamentary politicians, activists and organizations had previously helped him circumvent police control. in Hong Kong.

China will reportedly perceive this as a major provocation.

Early Tuesday morning, one of Hong Kong's most controversial opposition politicians and pro-democracy activists, Ted Hui, landed at Copenhagen Airport after a trip out of Hong Kong that could only be done because several Danish parliamentary politicians, activists and organizations had previously helped him circumvent police control. in Hong Kong.

China will reportedly perceive this as a major provocation.

replies.msg:
丹麥報章Politiken獨家報導，香港中西區區議員、前立法會議員許智峯（民主黨）今天早上（1日）已抵達哥本哈根機場。根據同一報章另一名記者在Twitter的訊息，許智峰明天（2日）會出席丹麥國會的外交委員會會議。報導形容，事件可能衝擊丹中關係，為丹麥政府帶來外交難題。

中文blog文章全文可看：https://bit.ly/33Au7pv

//丹麥外訪是許智峯每年均去的外訪行程，談及氣候變化。

許智峯於11月26日出庭時，控方曾提及其外訪的申請，最終法官指只要許智峯出發前72小時通知法庭及警方就可以。

而這次許智峯的行程是前往丹麥，由11月30日至12月4日，有關行程是談及氣候轉變。而由於丹麥不用隔離，回港時則需隔離14日。//
談及氣候轉變

Elbaek同時承認，安排虛構（fictitious）的會面行程來製造煙幕，迫使執政黨採取行動協助香港，及重新考慮整套對華政策。由於許智峯護照保釋期間交出護照由警方保管，報道引述民間團體成員牽線與部分綠色團體聯絡，令行程看上去似是與這些團體會面。

報道也引述許智峯說，計劃在哥本哈根期間表達中國剝奪香港各種自由，並準備後返港後可能面對的後果。
